dialogueChunks.intro: She's home, {player_name}. My daughter is home. I can't stop shaking.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: She ran to me the moment she saw the gate. She's thin, she's scared, and she flinches at loud noises, but she's alive because you managed to {quest_action}. {target_npc} is looking after the other rescued captives. {quest_stakes} are resolved: they're all in similar shape, but the healer says they'll recover.
dialogueChunks.outro: You brought my daughter back to me. I don't have words big enough for that. Take everything I can offer, and know it will never be enough.

playerResponses.text: Seeing her holding onto you is worth more than anything you could give me.
Take care of her. The nightmares will pass.

dialogueChunks.intro: Every single one of them is accounted for, {player_name}. Every single one.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} organized a gathering when the last of the rescued arrived. Names called out one by one, each answered with tears and embraces. You managed to {quest_action} and dismantled {quest_threat}'s operation completely. Every person taken is back where they belong.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here. The settlement voted to give you this from the communal fund. Unanimous. Not a single dissenting voice.

playerResponses.text: Every name answered. That's the only outcome I was willing to accept.
Glad everyone made it home. Keep your guard up: stay vigilant.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}. Most of them are home. Most.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We couldn't save everyone. The miller's son didn't survive captivity. But {target_npc} and the four others are alive and recovering because you managed to {quest_action}. {quest_threat}'s network is shattered. The grief for the one we lost is real and heavy. But so is the gratitude for the ones who came home.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this. It comes with our thanks and our sorrow, tangled together the way these things always are.

playerResponses.text: I'm sorry about the miller's son. I wish the outcome had been different.
The ones who survived will carry his memory. That's all any of us can do.

dialogueChunks.intro: They're safe, {player_name}. And {quest_threat} will never take anyone again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} wanted me to tell you something specific. They said: 'In the dark, when we heard fighting outside the chamber, we didn't know if it was rescue or execution. When the door opened and it was {player_name}, every person wept. Not from fear: from knowing that someone came.' That's what you did when you managed to {quest_action}. You came when no one else would.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement erected a marker at the gate: 'They came.' Take this, and know you will never be forgotten here.

playerResponses.text: 'They came.' Two words that say everything. Thank you for honoring me.
I came because it was the right thing to do. That's all.
